de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml

Class JMLInfoExtractor

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.JMLInfoExtractor

  • public final class JMLInfoExtractor
extends java.lang.Object
    Helper class used by the JML translation. Provides methods that look for certain keywords (such as "pure") in comments, and that help in desugaring such keywords.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      JMLInfoExtractor() 

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static boolean hasJMLModifier(FieldDeclaration fd, java.lang.String mod) 
      static boolean isHelper(IProgramMethod pm)
      Returns true iff the given method is specified "helper".
      static boolean isNullable(java.lang.String fieldName, KeYJavaType containingClass)
      Returns true, if containingClass is a reference Type and has a field declaration with name fieldName, which is explicitly or implicitly declared "nullable"
      static boolean isNullableByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
      Returns true if the given type is specified as nullable, i.e.
      static boolean isPure(IProgramMethod pm)
      Returns true iff the given method is specified "pure".
      static boolean isPureByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
      Returns true iff the given type is specified as pure, i.e.
      static boolean isStrictlyPure(IProgramMethod pm)
      Returns true iff the given method is specified "strictly_pure" or the containing type is specified so.
      static boolean isStrictlyPureByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
      Returns true iff the given type is specified as pure, i.e.
      static boolean parameterIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm, int pos)
      Returns true iff the pos-th parameter of the given method is declared "nullable" (implicitly or explicitly).
      static boolean parameterIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm, ParameterDeclaration pd)
      Returns true iff the parameter of the given method is declared "nullable" (implicitly or explicitly).
      static boolean resultIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm)

    • Constructor Detail

      • JMLInfoExtractor

        public JMLInfoExtractor()

    • Method Detail

      • hasJMLModifier

        public static boolean hasJMLModifier(FieldDeclaration fd,
                                     java.lang.String mod)

      • isPureByDefault

        public static boolean isPureByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
        Returns true iff the given type is specified as pure, i.e. all methods and constructors are by default specified "pure" If t is not a reference type, false is returned.

      • isStrictlyPureByDefault

        public static boolean isStrictlyPureByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
        Returns true iff the given type is specified as pure, i.e. all methods and constructors are by default specified "strictly_pure" If t is not a reference type, false is returned.

      • isNullableByDefault

        public static boolean isNullableByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
        Returns true if the given type is specified as nullable, i.e. all fields and method parameters are by default specified "nullable" If t is not a reference type, false is returned.

      • isNullable

        public static boolean isNullable(java.lang.String fieldName,
                                 KeYJavaType containingClass)
        Returns true, if containingClass is a reference Type and has a field declaration with name fieldName, which is explicitly or implicitly declared "nullable"

      • parameterIsNullable

        public static boolean parameterIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm,
                                          int pos)
        Returns true iff the pos-th parameter of the given method is declared "nullable" (implicitly or explicitly).

      • parameterIsNullable

        public static boolean parameterIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm,
                                          ParameterDeclaration pd)
        Returns true iff the parameter of the given method is declared "nullable" (implicitly or explicitly). Warning: weird things may happen if the parameter doesn't belong to the method.

      • resultIsNullable

        public static boolean resultIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm)

      • isPure

        public static boolean isPure(IProgramMethod pm)
        Returns true iff the given method is specified "pure".

      • isHelper

        public static boolean isHelper(IProgramMethod pm)
        Returns true iff the given method is specified "helper".

      • isStrictlyPure

        public static boolean isStrictlyPure(IProgramMethod pm)
        Returns true iff the given method is specified "strictly_pure" or the containing type is specified so.
